title: 给 Claude 一个角色和明确任务
title_en: Give Claude a Role and Clear Task

body.goal: 写出让 Claude 准确执行的 prompt
steps: 把 Claude 当成一个聪明但刚入职的新员工——他缺少你的业务上下文，需要你明确告知
在 system prompt 中给 Claude 一个角色，例如 'You are a senior code reviewer'
用具体的指令说明期望的输出格式和约束条件，不要让 Claude 猜
如果任务有多个步骤，用编号列表按顺序写出来
黄金法则：把你的 prompt 给一个不了解背景的同事看，如果他们会困惑，Claude 也会

body_en.goal: Write prompts that Claude executes accurately
steps: Treat Claude like a brilliant new hire — it lacks your business context and needs explicit instructions
Assign a role in the system prompt, e.g. 'You are a senior code reviewer'
Specify the desired output format and constraints explicitly — don't make Claude guess
For multi-step tasks, use numbered lists to lay out each step in order
Golden rule: show your prompt to a colleague with no context. If they'd be confused, Claude will be too
